reviews.author: Martin B
reviews.text: One of the best beaches I have visited. The sand is very fine and feels really soft. It is usually breezy, so the heat does not feel too strong. There are many cafés and sunbeds, which makes the stay more enjoyable. The beach is very long, so it never feels crowded and there is plenty of space for everyone. Swimming areas are limited due to strong sea currents.

reviews.author: Penny
reviews.text: The sand is incredibly soft, and the water is crystal clear—truly an absolutely stunning beach. It's the perfect spot to relax and watch the sunset. During the winter months, the vibe changes a bit with much stronger waves, which is impressive to watch from the shore.

reviews.author: SilentWitness
reviews.text: The beach is clean and super peaceful in the morning—perfect for a quiet walk. By evening, it gets crowded and noisy, with lots of vendors constantly pushing sales, which can be a bit overwhelming. Still, it’s a nice place to relax if you go early. 🌊

reviews.author: Berin Baser
reviews.text: Beautiful and long beach, super clean, good for surfing (in the right season). It wasn’t super crowded. We were there in December/January which are not the ideal months but it was perfect and water temperature was good. The beach was only a 30 seconds walk from our hotel. Anything you need is only a few minutes away

reviews.author: Agnes Ayu
reviews.text: When I came here it wasn't too busy, and I really enjoyed the silence on this beach... the beach is well maintained and there are even lots of showers, lots of rubbish bins... very clean. In fact, the day looking at the beach was very pleasant plus the breeze was gentle

reviews.author: kyo
reviews.text: the view is breathtaking! came here around mid-january, so the weather was just nice as it wasn't too hot but due to the strong undertow, the swimming area could be limited but still, a really nice beach if you would like to visit!!

reviews.author: RealReviews
reviews.text: Da Nang Beach is well worth a visit, even tho the water is not crystal clear as many say, the beach is perfect for some nice sandy walks. There are also all kind of essentials. From feet washers to get rid of sand, beach chairs and coconut sellers.

reviews.author: Mark Anthony Mendez
reviews.text: My Khe Beach is a white sand beach in Da Nang which is one of the tourist attractions where you can see tourist jogging in the side walk near the beach or in the beach side itself, others are swimming also, though I see signage "no swimming", surfing is one of the activities you can do as well, and lastly, you can enjoy the white sand playing with your friends sports like freebies, volleball and the like. The beach is clean and safe. It is alive anytime of the day from dawn to night time. You can enjoy foods and drinks at specific time of the day.

reviews.author: Tiberiu Ivan
reviews.text: Beautiful, clean, and relaxing beach. Soft sand, wide shoreline, and great for long walks. Even with waves, it feels safe and well-maintained. Perfect for sunrise and photos. One of the best beaches in Da Nang — highly recommend!

reviews.author: Nails and Art by Gıe
reviews.text: It was a great experience visiting this beach in Da nang. We enjoyed strolling in sea side. Most tourist favorite spot I think.

reviews.author: Pavel Manchik
reviews.text: The beach has a nice, long stretch lined with a variety of restaurants and places to grab food. Unfortunately, there is a strong undertow, so swimming isn’t recommended. Our kids still had a great time playing in the sand, but you do need to walk around a bit to find a cleaner area, as some sections are quite littered.

reviews.author: Pranay Nagdeve
reviews.text: A very peaceful beach in Da Nang. It's a long train of beaches where one can have a soothing walk and shacks to enjoy the sunshine. Good for surfing as well.

reviews.author: Lu
reviews.text: It's a beach with a really extensive stretch of sand and a well-structured, urbanized boardwalk, which is great for walking. Access is completely free. Despite its fame, I had mixed feelings, as the water wasn't very clean. An important point is that, for safety reasons, the lifeguards restrict the swimming area to a specific space. This causes all the swimmers to get quite crowded, but it is a necessary measure. It's beautiful to see, but these details detracted from the swimming experience.

reviews.author: Tai Soudalat
reviews.text: 🏖️Beautiful beach with so many ways to relax! Whether you want to swim, surf, or play volleyball and football, there’s something for everyone. There are also plenty of chill beachfront restaurants with great food and drinks at reasonable prices. I spent my days and nights walking, playing, and eating here—it’s truly the ultimate place to unwind!🍉

reviews.author: Yeoh Yuxian
reviews.text: Really beautiful and peaceful beach. It’s clean, quiet, and not crowded even in the morning. The sand is soft and the water is clear, with barely any trash around which is nice to see. I went for a walk here around sunrise and it was super calming — just the sound of waves and a few locals jogging or swimming. Definitely one of the nicer beaches I’ve been to in Vietnam. Perfect spot to relax and unwind.

reviews.author: Abhash Choudhary
reviews.text: Found this great beach within walking distance during an evening walk. It was calm, quiet, and very enjoyable. We didn't see it during the day, but it definitely seems worth a visit!

reviews.author: Google Lum
reviews.text: Was here in October recently. Walked to here after lunch so it was around 2-3pm. It was a cloudy day and only one person was enjoying himself on the beach. The beach was nice and clean.

reviews.author: Deb Jackson
reviews.text: What's not to like! Lots of people enjoy this beach. It is kept clean by the council. Happy days!

reviews.author: Rob the Nomad
reviews.text: Has to be Top 10 beach in the world, amazing beauty. Can walk on path for km's to see all the action

reviews.author: Russ Lacuata
reviews.text: Danang is home to the stunning My Khe Beach, considered one of the most natural beaches. My Khe is a popular destination among tourists to relax, have fun, and enjoy the seabreeze. Locals flocks to the area as well for their daily exercises and outdoor activities. The beach is known for its long stretch of fine white sands and the picturesque boardwalk. The gentle waves is great for swimming and relaxing. You can chill at a lounger chair while sipping on your favorite drinks.

reviews.author: Rith Pisey
reviews.text: I visited this highly recommended beach in Da Nang and really liked it. The beach was beautiful and clean, with security guards watching over the swimmers. The waves were quite big, but I managed to survive the swim haha. You need to rent and pay for the beach chairs, but overall it’s a nice place to relax.

reviews.author: Crinkle Cut
reviews.text: The beach is lovely even if the weather is not great at the moment. Its a very nice place for a walk and plenty of choices for refreshment

reviews.author: Christopher Lee An
reviews.text: I always went swimming during the hot days. The water here is shallow. There's no area where your feet touch the water, so there's no danger. The sand is like flour. It's so soft that you can hear a crunching sound. It's hard to shake it off. ^^ I went swimming at 7 p.m. There's no one there, and it feels like a swimming pool. My Vietnamese friend said he's going to Hoi An. He said it's quiet and different from the beach here. I picked up some trash. There's a lot of marine debris here too, but less than Vung Tau. You can't experience the deep waters of Nha Trang in February. The safe waters, comfortable sand, and subtropical sky make for a beautiful view.

reviews.author: Rohan Wagh
reviews.text: A very beautiful white sand beach in da nang. U can get a view of lady buddha from the beach ⛱️

reviews.author: Eileen Neo (Sgsohotleh)
reviews.text: Came here to catch sun rise but it was cloudy. But still a great place for morning or evening stroll. Very peaceful and alot of interesting observation of what the locals would be doing in the morning; dancing, exercising, surfing and enjoying the wave. The sand was very fine too! 😍

reviews.author: Maita Guia Balazo
reviews.text: Very nice beach! Long stretch of fine sand, no rocks or reefs as far as I know. Lots of space to just relax and lounge around. You can surf, too! Will definitely go back here.

reviews.author: Anna R
reviews.text: Beautiful beach. Really enjoyable to walk along the boardwalk. Lots of restaurants, beach chairs, and free benches to sit. Pretty clean for the most part. I’ve certainly seen worse. Definitely take the time to walk around here.

reviews.author: Jessica Ah Sing
reviews.text: Nice beach, lot of restaurants along the strip. The sand is soft and there are lifeguard son duty. You can rent a chair for 40 000VND.

reviews.author: Rahul Singh
reviews.text: One of the cleanest and most beautiful beaches in Vietnam! The sand is soft, the water is crystal clear, and the whole stretch feels very well maintained. It’s perfect for swimming, and the waves are great for beginners and intermediate surfers. The vibe is calm in the morning and lively towards sunset. Public toilets and changing rooms are available. Plenty of shops, cafés, and rentals nearby. A must-visit when in Da Nang! 🌊

reviews.author: O B Wan
reviews.text: Pleasant beach with palms and lots of places around the boulevard to sit down have a drink or grab a bite. Even got at a good time to see (and help!) the fishermen pull out the fishing nets
